heading: State laws
label: 2214 State laws
text: State and other laws shall apply to corporations organized pursuant to this part to the same extent such laws would apply to the organizing banks engaged in the same activity in the same jurisdiction: , That to the extent that sections 2023, 2098, and 2134 of this title may exempt banks or associations of the Farm Credit System from taxation, such exemptions, other than with respect to franchise taxes, shall not extend to corporations organized pursuant to this part.Provided, however
notes: Amendments1991— made technical amendment to reference to to reflect change in reference to corresponding section of original act.Pub. L. 102–237section 2098 of this title1988— inserted “or associations” and substituted “2023, 2098,” for “2055, 2079,”.Pub. L. 100–399
